channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Here's the inflation breakdown for April 2026 — in one chart
item.description: The Iran war has pushed up gasoline, groceries and other prices for consumers.

item.title: It's not just Iran and oil raising inflation. Prices also are reaccelerating in these other areas
item.description: Here's some of the places where prices are rising fast for consumers.

item.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh as Fed governor, clears way for chair vote
item.description: The upper chamber voted to approve Warsh's nomination by a 51-45 vote, on a mostly party-line basis.

item.title: OpenAI trial updates: Altman says Musk's exit was a 'morale boost' for some employees
item.description: Elon Musk is accusing OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and President Greg Brockman of trying to 'steal a charity.'

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Wendy's, Vestis, Cleanspark, Under Armour & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves midday.

item.title: Five reasons why oil prices haven’t surged higher despite the Iran war
item.description: The oil market faces the largest supply disruption in its history, yet prices aren't that high compared with the past. Wall Street analysts have five reasons why.

item.title: United Airlines flight attendants ratify new contract with 31% raises this summer
item.description: United Airlines flight attendants ratify labor deal that would provide first raises in nearly 6 years.

item.title: Qualcomm drops 13% as chip stocks pull back from record AI-driven rally
item.description: The recent rally has shown a broadening of the AI trade beyond chipmaking giant Nvidia.

item.title: Bulls and bears both believe this could be 1999 all over again. Embrace it or dump your tech stocks?
item.description: We are not guaranteed a close rerun of the 1999-2000 extremes. Just because things got crazier then doesn't mean that's ahead of us.

item.title: EBay rejects GameStop's $56 billion takeover bid, calling it 'neither credible nor attractive'
item.description: Many analysts questioned the deal, citing concerns about how GameStop would finance the transaction and the strategic rationale.

item.title: Trump is taking more than a dozen U.S. executives to China. Jensen Huang isn't one of them
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang isn't going on Trump’s China trip, though more than a dozen other U.S. executives are.

item.title: The summer box office is off to a hot start as weekend ticket sales top $160 million
item.description: The summer box office is off to a sizzling start, thanks in part to strong week-after-week performance from returning titles.

item.title: Novo Nordisk says high-dose Wegovy helped some patients lose nearly 28% of their weight
item.description: Novo Nordisk released new data that could help boost the case for the higher dose version of its blockbuster obesity injection Wegovy.

item.title: 2.6 million student loan borrowers fell into default in early 2026: New York Fed
item.description: Student loan defaults are showing up on consumers' credit reports for the first time since the Covid pandemic, a new blog by the New York Fed shows.

item.title: AI super rally has retail investors acting the most aggressive since trading frenzy during Covid
item.description: Retail traders are buying calls in Cboe's "Mag 10" stocks – the big seven plus AMD, Palantir and Broadcom – at the heaviest 10-day clip since 2021, according to a report from the exchange.

item.title: This new GLP-1 play is on a tear. UBS sees nearly a 50% gain from here
item.description: MBX Biosciences has rallied more than 230% over the past year, but there's room for still more upside from current levels, according to UBS.

item.title: Analysis: Iran war hangs over Trump's China trip — and his presidency
item.description: There is no quick fix to the economic and political damage from the war.

item.title: Hims & Hers plummets 13% after first-quarter loss, weak earnings guidance
item.description: Hims & Hers reached a deal with Novo Nordisk in March to sell its GLP-1 weight loss drug Wegovy on its platform.

item.title: Crypto legislation faces another hurdle: Labor unions
item.description: Major labor groups ask senators in a letter obtained first by CNBC to oppose a crypto bill over concerns retirement accounts could be harmed.

item.title: Denver airport security initially missed trespasser who was killed by plane on runway
item.description: The collision involving the Frontier plane sparked an engine fire that forced passengers to evacuate. Twelve people were injured.

item.title: The case for owning cybersecurity stocks in the age of AI just got stronger
item.description: New evidence showed that hackers are using AI to accelerate more sophisticated cyberattacks.

item.title: The best places to buy gold coins online
item.description: Buying gold coins online to diversify your investment portfolio is simple with these four dealers.

item.title: Amazon accelerates delivery race with 30-minute drop-offs in dozens of U.S. cities
item.description: Amazon has been gradually speeding up its delivery windows, after getting customers hooked on two-day and next-day shipping.

item.title: On Holding beats first-quarter expectations, sees double-digit growth in China as Nike lags
item.description: Swiss sneaker company On beat Wall Street's expectations on the top and bottom lines, helped in part by strong sales in China.

item.title: U.S. crude oil tops $100 again as hope fades for a U.S.-Iran peace deal
item.description: Oil prices rose Tuesday amid concerns over a prolonged Middle East conflict after President Trump's comments that the ceasefire with Iran is on "life support"

item.title: UK MPs are turning on PM Starmer — now analysts say he's unlikely to last the year
item.description: Analysts have slashed the odds of Starmer facing a leadership challenge by September.

item.title: What's at stake for trade, Taiwan and Iran in Trump's high-risk summit with China's Xi
item.description: China experts anticipate Trump and Xi may announce trade deals or other agreements, such as a Chinese purchase of U.S. agricultural products or Boeing aircraft.

item.title: SoftBank has injected $450 million into this British AI chip company
item.description: U.K.-based Graphcore is developing AI chips and systems and was acquired by the Japanese giant in 2024.

item.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
item.description: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.

item.title: GM cutting hundreds of salaried IT workers as it trims costs, evaluates needs
item.description: General Motors is laying off hundreds of salaried employees in its information technology operations.
